metadata.name: Soda-Lime Glass
metadata.title: Soda-Lime Glass Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing soda-lime glass laser cleaning operations.

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for effective contaminant removal below glass damage threshold

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete contaminant removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform cleaning without excessive thermal buildup
